ticket.description:

Thank you

comments.body:
Hi Helen,

Greetings from PluginHive!

Thank you for reaching out. I would like to understand this better so we can investigate effectively. Could you please explain the order flow in the following cases:

1. A normal order without using One Click Upsell
2.

An order using One Click Upsell



Could you also explain the order flow while using One Click Upsell, and the reason for using it?



If possible, please create two test orders—one for each scenario—and keep their status as Processing so we can check. You can also record a short video showing the flow, which would be very helpful.

Once we have these details, we will review and see what can be done to resolve this.

Thank you for your support and cooperation.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Thank you so much for looking into this Priyanka. These are actually three processes:



1. A new order without One Click Upsell - user adds product to cart. User does not accept the 'in cart' offer of an 'upsell' provided by OCU (One Click Upsell). User pays for order.

2. A new order with user accepting an 'in cart' upsell - User adds product to cart. User goes to cart and adds the additional 'in cart' upsell offer of a discounted product. User goes through checkout and pays for order.

The tin in the pic below is an 'in cart offer'

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/YsonfFpvgiPEzCJhWbQsdULHP/?name=image.png)



3. A new order with user accepting a 'post-purchase' offer by OCU - User adds product to cart. User goes through checkout and pays for product. After product has been paid for OCU offers a 'post purchase' product (with high discount). User accept the post-purchase offer and pays additional amount



I guess there is also process 4 where a user accepts both the in cart upsell and the post-purchase upsell.



The only issue in your app seems to be with the 'Post-purchase' upsell offer.



I have created four new orders for you to test:
#1882 -  A new order without One Click Upsell

#1883 -  A new order with user accepting an 'in cart' upsell

#1884 -  A new order with user accepting a 'post-purchase' offer by OCU

#1885 -  A new order with user accepting both the 'in cart' offer and 'post-purchase' offer by OCU



Please advise



![](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcU9YoIW_O8ryTI9j9h4Q58m9c1pdivdSRZfGeNZkv1TfgpiQvG41yjdlA71tHy5xyz1czFfzm3I6vG1y0Pml2yWfAnbIHcIJ3eGxnjsg25X5_P43waXQnhRAuvxPNZFGRfLorTbw?key=ojiJMP-H17WdvQEniGCIS4CX)

HELEN

Founder

helen@brewlala.com.au

www.brewlala.com.au

comments.body:
Hello Helen,

Thank you for the detailed explanation.

Upon checking, I can see that order 1884 has been imported into the app and is visible on the Orders page. Could you please confirm if it was marked as “Not to Ship” initially and then you moved it manually to the orders page, or if it was automatically moved to the orders page section?

Also, does this happen for all orders with the post-purchase upsell, or is it occurring randomly?

Please let us know so we can take this forward with our product team.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Helen,
 
Thank you for the detailed explanation.
 
Upon checking, I can see that order 1884 has been imported into the app and is visible on the Orders page. Could you please confirm if it was marked as “Not to Ship” initially and then you moved it manually to the orders page, or if it was automatically moved to the orders page section?
 
Also, does this happen for all orders with the post-purchase upsell, or is it occurring randomly?
 
Please let us know so we can take this forward with our product team.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka

comments.body:
Hello Helen,

The orange refresh circle appears when any changes are made to an order in Shopify after it has been imported into the app.

Could you please let me know what changes are being made after the order is placed by the customer? This will help us understand why the orders are disappearing and assist you better.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3: Orders disappearing / moving to “Not to Ship” when using One Click Upsell (OCU)
https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1775710954257909

MCSL customer from Australia using our app for rates and labels, and the website has One Click Upsell (OCU) installed. There are four scenarios observed:

1. #1882 – New order without One Click Upsell
  - User adds product to cart, does not accept any upsell.
  - User completes checkout and pays.
  -

Order imports into the app correctly.



2. #1883 – New order with “in-cart” upsell
  - User adds product to cart, accepts the discounted “in-cart” upsell, and completes checkout.
  -

Order imports correctly.



3. #1884 – New order with “post-purchase” upsell
  - User adds product to cart, completes checkout, and then accepts a post-purchase upsell with additional payment.
  - Order imports initially, but when a change is made to the order, the refresh icon appears.
  -

Clicking the refresh moves the order to “Not to Ship” section.



4. #1885 – New order with both “in-cart” and “post-purchase” upsells
  -

Similar issue expected as scenario 3.



Orders with post-purchase upsells are not behaving as expected when refreshed. Customer has shared sample orders for testing.

Please investigate why orders with post-purchase upsells are moved to “Not to Ship” upon refresh.

Orders for testing :
#1882, #1883, #1884, #1885

Store details:
Store url : g0tpg2-tk.myshopify.com
AC ID: 6f1ba80e-3aa8-45e2-a633-1ae84b0ef29f
Activr from : 2025-06-30
Plan: $19
comments.html_body:
L3: Orders disappearing / moving to “Not to Ship” when using One Click Upsell (OCU)
https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1775710954257909
 
MCSL customer from Australia using our app for rates and labels, and the website has One Click Upsell (OCU) installed. There are four scenarios observed:
  1. #1882 – New order without One Click Upsell
    • User adds product to cart, does not accept any upsell.
    • User completes checkout and pays.

    • Order imports into the app correctly.

       

  2. #1883 – New order with “in-cart” upsell
    • User adds product to cart, accepts the discounted “in-cart” upsell, and completes checkout.

    • Order imports correctly.

       

  3. #1884 – New order with “post-purchase” upsell
    • User adds product to cart, completes checkout, and then accepts a post-purchase upsell with additional payment.
    • Order imports initially, but when a change is made to the order, the refresh icon appears.

    • Clicking the refresh moves the order to “Not to Ship” section.

       

  4. #1885 – New order with both “in-cart” and “post-purchase” upsells

    • Similar issue expected as scenario 3.

       

Orders with post-purchase upsells are not behaving as expected when refreshed. Customer has shared sample orders for testing.

Please investigate why orders with post-purchase upsells are moved to “Not to Ship” upon refresh.
 
Orders for testing : 
#1882, #1883, #1884, #1885
 
Store details: 
Store url : g0tpg2-tk.myshopify.com
AC ID: 6f1ba80e-3aa8-45e2-a633-1ae84b0ef29f
Activr from : 2025-06-30
Plan: $19
